title: EUDOSI Under the Sea Birthday Party Invitations Supplies Fill-In Set of 20 with Envelopes Whale Crab Sea Life Birthday Party Invites Cards, Double Sided
features: Special Design: Every invitation card for the party showcases designs and concepts associated with the party's theme - elegant and distinctive. Professional designers enhance the uniqueness of the invitation card through the use of color, text, and appearance. Offer the receiver a glimpse of your personal style through the invitation they are given.
Exquisite Set: Set of 20 Each includes 20 party invitation cards and 20 matching envelopes.
Suitable Size: The invitation cards measure approximately 4 * 6 inches and feature a sophisticated double-sided design.

Party Essentials: Each great invitation card provides space to fill such as date, time, location, how to respond, and additional information. The paper surface is easy for writing and suitable of different types of pens.

Various Themes: These nice looking invitation cards can be used for a variety of party occasions, such as birthdays, baby showers, weddings, weekend gatherings, and others. We have a wide selection of invitation cards with various themes for girls, boys, and even grown-ups to choose from.
description: Partying is one of the best memories in life. It brings together your family, friends and colleagues to create cherished memories in a setting filled with happiness, affection, and good wishes. You can capture enchanting moments through photographs, enjoy delicious food and drink, or engage in recreational activities with your companions. By doing so, you can deepen emotions and light up life at the party. Every detail in the party reflects the host's taste and intentions. We offers a wide selection of party supplies that cater to everyone's needs, with expert design and genuine motives. Let everyone who sees them like it, and use them to create more joy and fun.
